author: Dipkumar Patel
name: SP8192 + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + U-Net Skips + GPTQ
blurb: SP8192 tokenizer (from kevclark/parameter-golf) with 3-layer depth recurrence (layers 3-5 looped 2x, 13 effective layers from 10 physical), parallel residuals on layers 7+, U-Net skip connections, BigramHash(10240), SmearGate, EMA(0.997), LeakyReLU^2, GQA(8q/4kv), partial RoPE(16), value residual(0.95), XSA(last 4), orthogonal init, Muon+AdamW, late QAT, full-Hessian GPTQ int6/int5 with percentile-search scales, zlib compression. 14.09MB artifact.
note: Result from 1xH100 (1/8 competition compute). Expect significant improvement on 8xH100 with batch=786432.
